hotel_name: Khách sạn Golden Sun Đà Nẵng (Golden Sun Hotel Da Nang)

reviews.title: Not 4 stars
reviews.text: A four star hotel with stained bed sheet and dirty bathroom. One would think a 4 star hotel would have a smart tv, nope, no smart tv only 3 English channels that have movies. Decide for yourself if you want to book this hotel. Myself, I will not return.

reviews.title: Not as advertised
reviews.text:
Breakfast had very little variety the problem was the quality, the few items were cold or empty. 

Very very loud, thin walls, you can hear the elevator go up and down, the ding of it hitting every floor. The main road has lots of traffic which was quieter than the hotel itself.

Tv did not work, my father's room had a mini fridge that didn't work, aircons that would make big shaking noises randomly.

It was a shame to be honest. Grateful to have been in a hotel during tet, I appreciate the staff that accommodated us through this very special holiday. The beds are comfy and it is near the beach.

reviews.title: Worst breakfast ever
reviews.text:
Worst breakfast in Vietnam! 
Staff had no clue about service! 
Room was dirty ! 
Took over 45 minutes to check in, staff did not acknowledge I was standing at the check in desk for 15 minutes, kept serving Vietnamese and ignored me. 
I have lived in Vietnam 14 years and travel regularly throughout- worst hotel I have been in for some time. 
Overpriced and not clean !

reviews.title: The house keeper accessed to my room twice without permission
reviews.text: I did lock the door. However, the house keeper used her universal card to open the door and banged until it was unlocked, without my permission. Avoid! No safety! No privacy!

reviews.title: Whew !
reviews.text: Looks nothing like the pictures. Like AT ALL. Definitely get what you pay for. Wouldn’t recommend for families  the traffic is heavy with hotel culture (working girls) if you know what I mean lol

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Stay could have been better

reviews.title: Satisfaction relative to price
reviews.text: If you like walking, the Mike area is close and good for a stroll, and the Sunjaya Market is about a 20-minute walk away. The restaurant Lapin is nearby, making it a good option for having lunch alone. However, for those who dislike walking, the location might seem a bit awkward. This is purely my personal opinion.

reviews.title: Vacation
reviews.text: I had been few days on my vacation at Da nang and picked Golden Sun hotel  by searching online interview .... I was feel great when i stay here .. I just felt little unhappy tgat i come check in at 1pm and leave luggage at receiptionist and wait till 2 pm to check in , but when i come back at 2 that still get response from receiotionist that my room still clean after wait 30 minutes so i felt little unhappy about it... But most of things fine on my trip and i still recommand this hotel to anyone cause it is closed beach

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
As per the price hotel was good and staff also supportive 
And location  is perfect  for beach as well as dragon bridge as it is mid of that

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: We had a comfortable stay. Proximity to the My Khe beach is very close. Spacious rooms and facilities are also okay. B'fast looks okay but unfortunately it doesn't suit our taste bud. I can't blame them. Rooms are little pricy for this facility.

reviews.title: Tạm ổn
reviews.text: Có bạn lễ tân giọng bắc có vẻ không nắm rõ các dịch vụ của khách sạn lắm. Phòng tắm không ổn lắm. Ăn sáng tạm ổn, nhưng lên hơi muộn thì hết đồ không mang ra thêm, khoing có nhân viên đứng phục vụ, hướng dẫn khi lên muộn.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The room are not soundproof at all

reviews.title: Happy
reviews.text: This hotel has a great location, close to the beach and tourist attractions. The rooms are clean and comfortable. The staff is friendly and enthusiastic. The Wi-Fi is strong and the hot water is stable.

reviews.title: Value for money hotel
reviews.text: The price was only good for what it was worth. The staff's attitude is good. The view is nice. It’s also good for taking Grab. The location is great, the beach is close. There are many delicious restaurants nearby. The accommodation is cleaned every day, but they keep using the same sheets, even though they are stained. Towels are replaced daily, but they are quite worn out. There are cockroaches in the room. I don’t know about breakfast since I didn't eat it. Soundproofing was not good; noise from the hallway was very noticeable. I stayed for five nights and it was bearable for my easy-going nature. However, someone with a sensitive personality might find it hard to stay for multiple nights.

reviews.title: Affordable accommodation in a good location
reviews.text: It is a 1-minute walk to Mok Restaurant and a 6-minute walk to Meke Beach, and Grab is easily available. It seems a bit old, but it’s okay for a budget accommodation... I wish the shower pressure was a bit stronger, and the hot water temperature is disappointing. Couples or family travelers might prefer a better hotel...

reviews.title: The hotel staff is very enthusiastic (morning shift).
reviews.text: My family booked 3 days from June 21 to June 24 at this hotel. The highlight that I felt was Ms. Ngân (the receptionist on the morning shift) who was very enthusiastic. Many customers kept asking questions while she was alone, yet she remained calm and always greeted them with a warm smile to assist them (her professionalism exceeds that of staff at 5-star hotels despite Golden Sun being only 4 stars). Additionally, there was Ms. Huệ (the housekeeping staff): she was very smart and quick-witted. However, regarding the facilities, the elevator lacks ventilation, making it very uncomfortable to use during the summer. The hotel's location is decent (close to the beach) compared to the room rate. Also, the hotel offers a motorbike rental service, which is very convenient.

reviews.title: Great Stay Near My Khe Beach!
reviews.text: I chose this hotel for its prime location, just minutes from My Khe Beach—perfect for easy access without the hassle of long commutes. The room was spotlessly clean, comfortable, and offered excellent value for money. Had a pleasant stay overall and would recommend it for beach lovers on a budget!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Good Hotel, Good Location!
There are plenty of good restaurants and convenience stores, just a short walking distance away from this hotel.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: About 0.5 nights is fine.
reviews.text: I stayed for half a night just to wash up and store my luggage, which was fine. As for the accommodation, the soundproofing wasn't great, and there was some road noise since it’s located in front of a major road. Other than that, the staff were quite friendly and overall it was okay.

reviews.title: Good for short stay
reviews.text: We only stayed for some hours before our return flight, but everything was fine. Clean room and comfortable bed. Mini mart and restaurants nearby.

reviews.title: It has all you need
reviews.text: The hotel isn’t new but it is in really good condition! Definitely great value for the price you pay 👍🏽 I would recommend it if you are staying just for a couple of nights ☺️

reviews.title: You shouldn't rent a motorbike at the hotel.
reviews.text: The accommodation is fine, the staff are polite and respectful, and the rooms are clean. The location is more than 400m away from the beach, which I consider not very close, the room view is not beautiful, and the breakfast is basic but tastes okay. Personally, I think you should NOT rent a motorcycle at the hotel. The rental price is high; I agreed to rent from the hotel for convenience. However, after I confirmed the rental, they also called an outside service to bring the bike, which is weak and not of good quality.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good hotel service, clean room with breakfast; if there were a parking lot for cars, it would be perfect. I am very satisfied with my stay here.

reviews.title: Very good location
reviews.text: Nice clean and very good location close to the attractions.

reviews.title: Good place
reviews.text: Good location n helpful staffs

reviews.title: Good place
reviews.text: Great location and helpful staffs

reviews.title: Fabulous stay
reviews.text:
My family (12 adults, 3 kids under 10) enjoyed our stay here at Golden Sun. Location is very closed to the beach, convenient to get to all attractions in Da Nang. Staffs are friendly and very helpful. We booked 3 double rooms and 1 apartment for our 6 days in Da Nang. Rooms are very clean 

We will be back for our next time gathering. Thank you Golden Sun and thank you Da Nang

reviews.title: hOtel stay
reviews.text: We are satisfied  in our stay in Golden Sun Hotel. The family suite is spacious and clean.

reviews.title: Love it
reviews.text: We had a great stay at this hotel and was overall very satisfied with the experience. The staff were friendly and welcoming, the room was clean and comfortable, and the location was convenient for everything I needed. I appreciated the attention to detail and the overall atmosphere it made my stay relaxing and enjoyable. I would definitely consider staying here again and recommend it to others looking for a reliable and pleasant place to stay.

reviews.title: Mok Restaurant View
reviews.text: It's right across from the Danang Mok restaurant. I made a 0.5-night reservation for the day of my return, and it was very kind and had excellent cleaning conditions. The price was a bit on the expensive side, but it was wonderful. The location was also good for walking to the beach~
reviews.room_type: Family Room, 2 Double Beds, City View

reviews.title: I love the stay
reviews.text:
Amazing stay, prominent location and rest everything was up to the mark.
Hotel staff was very supportive specially the front staff on the reception onthe day we checked in.
We don't know the names but the two girls who were in the evening shift and the next day we checkout.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff was amazing! They were super friendly and helpful. The breakfast was really good and had lots of options. It is located a short walk from the Dragon Bridge in one direction and a couple of blocks from the beach in the other. We really enjoyed our stay!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We loved the location of the hotel: close to the beach and the city center, including the night market. We loved our room on the top floor, and the service: Ngan was very helpful, she assisted us in arranging our trip to another city for a low price. She was in direct contact with a bus driver (who did not speak English) and even after her working hours, she monitored our trip to ensure everything went smoothly (and it did!). Additionally, we did not have much time in Da Nang but wanted to visit both the Marble and Monkey mountains. Nam from the hotel offered to drive us to both attractions - he was so kind that he waited for us and when we finished our visits, he took us back to the hotel where the bus arranged by Ngan was waiting for us. Very nice, helpful, and kind staff; thanks to them we felt very safe and secure. Thank you so much, guys <3

reviews.title: The cost performance is amazing.
reviews.text: The washbasin is large, and the shower room is sufficiently partitioned from the toilet, with large windows that provide a sense of openness. The water pressure is a bit weak, but the hot water comes out perfectly. The building is aging, but the bed is made carefully every day, making it extremely comfortable. This time, I was fortunate to reserve at a reasonable price, so I will extend my stay.

reviews.title: Nice Place
reviews.text: Good Service, Nice place, clean 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

reviews.title: Wonderful experience
reviews.text: The hotel is luxurious and beautiful, but surprisingly inexpensive, and the view of the sea is really nice. The staff and the owner are very enthusiastic and friendly; it was a wonderful experience.

reviews.title: Cumple con lo prometido
reviews.text: Este hotel tiene una localización magnifica a 20 minutos andando de lo mas turistico de la ciudad, asi como estar a 5 minutos de la playa, tener restaurantes y super mercados cerca tambien. Las habitaciones eran limpias y estaban bien aisladas del ruido del exterior. El precio es más que justo.

reviews.title: Bon séjour à Da Nang
reviews.text:
Bon séjour pour notre passage dans la cité balnéaire de Da Nang.
Chambre plutôt spacieuse, petit déjeuner varié ou l'on a d'ailleurs une assez joli vue. Services ok. 
Situé à environ 15min à pied de la plage et du Dragon bridge.

reviews.title: 快適なホテルでした。
reviews.text: 窓の大きい部屋が開放感あって、また泊まりたいです＾＾

reviews.title: 0.5박 가성비 숙소
reviews.text:
출국 전 짐도 풀겸 쉴겸 해서 0.5박 숙소로 선택했습니다. 위치가 좋은게 한국인들이 가장 사랑하는 식당인 목식당뷰에 ㅋㅋㅋ 걸어서 5분이에요. 미케비치는 걸어서 십분정도??
근처에 식당도 많아 밥먹고 돌아다니다 쉬다 공항가기 딱 좋았어요!

reviews.title: 가격대비 만족
reviews.text:
저는 밤비행기를 타기 전 잠시 머무르기 위해 이용했습니다.
나름 침구 상태와 방 상태는 깨끗했습니다. 다만 샴푸 비누가 없다는 점이 조금 아쉬웠습니다.

reviews.title: 가성비 좋습니다.
reviews.text: 밤 도착 시 1박으로 좋습니다. 직원 분들 정말 친절하고 바다 가까워요.
